otherOption.allowHelper: Participants can add a custom answer if none of the options fit.
otherOption.label: Other: specify

dashboard.title: Assessments
dashboard.body: Create assessments, share the link, and follow responses as they come in.
dashboard.emptyBody: Create your first guided visual assessment to start collecting structured responses.
dashboard.createNasijAssessmentError: Unable to create the NASIJ assessment.
dashboard.deleteBody: This will permanently remove the assessment and its responses.
dashboard.explorationBody: What participants selected during the first step.
dashboard.prioritizationBody: The challenges that rose to the top.
dashboard.framingBody: Needs emerging from the selected and prioritized challenges.
dashboard.publishToGenerateLink: Publish the assessment to generate a public link.
dashboard.noResponsesToExport: No responses available to export yet.

assessmentCreate.title: Create assessment
assessmentCreate.helper: Choose how you want to start.

startFromScratch.title: Start from scratch
startFromScratch.description: Create an empty assessment and build the flow manually.

templates.title: Use an existing template
templates.description: Choose a template to create a new editable assessment.
templates.choiceDescription: Start from a saved or default structure and customize it.
templates.buildNewHelper: Create a reusable structure in the normal builder. Template mode will already be enabled.
templates.nasijDescription: Identify goals, challenges, needs and collaboration opportunities across short, medium and long term.
templates.blankDescription: A reusable blank structure you can use as a starting point.
templates.createNewPlaceholder: A blank reusable template was created. Full template editing can be connected in the builder in a later step.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete template?
deleteConfirm.body: This will permanently remove the template. Assessments already created from it will not be affected.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.body: Manage your assessments and review results in one place.
auth.mockNote: Supabase Auth is not configured, so this local build uses a mock designer session.
auth.signUpSuccess: Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least {min} characters.
auth.accountExists: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.
auth.unexpectedError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.supabaseRequired: Supabase Auth is not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to enable designer access.

home.title: Build a guided visual assessment
home.body: Build guided assessments, share them with participants, and turn responses into structured insights you can review and export.

assessment.demoDescription: A guided visual path to identify challenges, rank priorities and frame emerging needs.

exploration.title: Explore current challenges
exploration.prompt: What are the main short-term challenges your organization is facing?

prioritization.title: Prioritize the selected challenges
prioritization.prompt: Tap the elements in order of priority.

framing.title: Frame the emerging needs
framing.prompt: Based on these priorities, describe the needs that emerge for your organization.
framing.defaultQuestionPrompt: What needs emerge from these priorities?

builder.title: Assessment builder
builder.assessmentFlowHelper: Organize the steps participants will complete.
builder.noActivitySelected: Select an activity to configure it.
builder.publishHint: Publishing creates a public token for participant access.
builder.templatePublishHint: Templates cannot be published or shared directly.
builder.templateSaveHint: This structure is saved as a reusable template and will appear in the template list.
builder.deleteDraftBody: This will permanently delete this draft assessment and return you to the dashboard.

templateToggle.label: Save this assessment as a template
templateToggle.helper: Templates are reusable structures. They cannot be published or shared directly.

profiling.description: Collect basic context about the participant or organization.

exploration.description: Collect needs, challenges, opportunities, and open inputs.

prioritization.description: Ask participants to rank what matters most.

framing.description: Capture the needs and reflections that emerge.

planning_report.description: Generate a structured report from the participant's answers.

profiling.label: Profiling
profiling.purpose: Collect contextual information about the participant or organization.

exploration.label: Exploration
exploration.purpose: Identify relevant elements based on a guiding question.

prioritization.label: Prioritization
prioritization.purpose: Rank elements from a previous Exploration activity.
prioritization.tapInstruction: Tap the elements in order of priority.

framing.label: Framing
framing.purpose: Collect a guided reflection based on a previous ranking.

planning_report.label: Planning report
planning_report.purpose: Generate a structured report from the participant's answers.

activity.label: Planning report
activity.description: Generate a structured report from the participant's answers.
activity.finalStepWarning: This activity should be placed at the end of the assessment.

builder.subtitle: Subtitle
builder.sectionsHelper: Build the report from the activities in this assessment. Section titles become report chapters; activity titles become subsections.

subtitle.default: A structured summary based on your assessment responses.

planningReport.participantDescription: This report organizes your answers into a structured planning output.

finalSubmit.title: Final step
finalSubmit.description:
You have completed the questionnaire.
You can now submit your answers and finish the NASIJ assessment.

delete.title: Delete template?
delete.body: This will permanently remove the template. Assessments already created from it will not be affected.

welcome.title: Welcome to the NASIJ assessment
welcome.description: This questionnaire helps identify your organization's current challenges, objectives, priorities and support needs in relation to sustainability, decent work and the development of the NASIJ network.

participant.completionBody:
Thank you for completing the questionnaire.

The report turns the collected responses into structured feedback and strategic planning, useful for understanding the main themes that emerged, defining priorities, and supporting decisions for the people and organizations involved.
participant.completionBodyNoReport:
Thank you for completing the questionnaire.

Your responses have been submitted successfully.
participant.notFound: This public assessment link is not available.
participant.notPublished: This assessment is not currently open.
